name: Flavored Olives
recipeIngredient: 1 cup large uncured green olives (with pits)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonreactive saucepan, combine the large uncured green olives with pits, dried cayenne chili peppers, white vinegar, and water.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
5. Transfer the cooled mixture to an airtight container and refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. Stuff the pitted olives with the flavored olive mixture and serve on a decorative plate.
